sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74559" key="o(plokaqarsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁπλο-κᾰθαρσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁπλό-ιον</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱερόν</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., ib.</entryFree>
